item.title: Ex-Prince Andrew Arrested on Morning of His 66th Birthday, Police Search His Homes in Sandringham and Windsor
item.description: A number of police cars were pictured at Wood Farm on King Charles' Sandringham estate on the morning of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's 66th birthday

item.title: Ke Huy Quan and Jeff Cohen Have a “Goonies ”Reunion in L.A., Plus Michelle Yeoh, Mark Wahlberg and More
item.description: From Los Angeles to New York City, and everywhere in between, see what your favorite stars are up to

item.title: Reward for Information About Savannah Guthrie's Missing Mom Nancy Increased to Over $200,000
item.description: An extensive search for Nancy Guthrie, 84, is now in its third week

item.title: Kate Middleton’s Penny Loafers Are a Sleek Upgrade from Ballet Flats and Sneakers — Get a Pair for Spring from $23
item.description: Who says cushy shoes can’t be cute?

item.title: Hailey Bieber Shares Rare Update on Her and Justin Bieber's Son Jack Blues, and Says She Wants More Kids
item.description: Hailey appeared on the latest episode of Jake Shane's 'Therapuss,' now airing on Netflix
